raw: This pass allows half price admission for up to four people. This e-pass is not an entry ticket. All visitors must also reserve a timed-entry ticket from the Children's Museum for admission. Visitors can reserve the museum discount e-pass through this website, then purchase a timed-entry ticket from the Children's Museum website at: https://bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing . Visitors must show the date-specific museum e-pass from the Gleason Library and their timed-entry reservation to the Admissions Scanning Station at the museum. Library coupons are not valid for Sunday afternoons. Admission is $1 per person on Sundays from 1:30 -4:30 p.m.
